tasks.subject: T0: Project scaffolding
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create pipeline/ directory tree with pyproject.toml, .gitignore, conftest.py, package init files; pytest runnable.

**Files:** pipeline/pyproject.toml, pipeline/.gitignore, pipeline/conftest.py, pipeline/README.md, all `__init__.py` files, root .gitignore

**Verify:** `cd pipeline && python -m pytest -v` → 0 passed, 0 errors

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pipeline/pyproject.toml", "pipeline/.gitignore", "pipeline/conftest.py", "pipeline/README.md", ".gitignore"], "verifyCommand": "cd pipeline && python -m pytest -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["pytest exits 0 with no tests collected", "pipeline/config/pipeline.yaml is gitignored", "package paths resolve"]}
```

tasks.subject: T1: lib/config.py YAML loader
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Typed dataclass config loader with validation. [parallel-eligible after T0]

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pipeline/desktop/lib/config.py", "pipeline/tests/lib/test_config.py", "pipeline/config/pipeline.example.yaml"], "verifyCommand": "cd pipeline && python -m pytest tests/lib/test_config.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["load_config returns Config dataclass on valid YAML", "missing required key raises ConfigError naming the path", "defaults applied for tomboy.diary_notebook_name and title_format", "example_yaml round-trips"]}
```

tasks.subject: T2: lib/state.py atomic JSON state
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Atomic load/update/save of per-stage JSON state files. [parallel-eligible after T0]

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pipeline/desktop/lib/state.py", "pipeline/tests/lib/test_state.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd pipeline && python -m pytest tests/lib/test_state.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["read returns {} when file missing", "write is atomic (temp file + os.replace)", "update merges keys", "remove deletes entry, missing-key remove is noop"]}
```

tasks.subject: T3: lib/log.py JSONL + human logger
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Stage-scoped logger writing both JSONL and human-readable lines. [parallel-eligible after T0]

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pipeline/desktop/lib/log.py", "pipeline/tests/lib/test_log.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd pipeline && python -m pytest tests/lib/test_log.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["info/warning/error each emit JSONL + human lines", "JSONL parseable with ts/stage/level/event/kwargs", "multiple calls append (no overwrite)", "creates parent dir"]}
```

tasks.subject: T4: ocr_backends/base.py ABC + registry
tasks.description:
**Goal:** OCRBackend ABC, OCRResult dataclass, register_backend decorator + get_backend factory. [parallel-eligible after T0]

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pipeline/desktop/ocr_backends/base.py", "pipeline/tests/ocr_backends/test_base.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd pipeline && python -m pytest tests/ocr_backends/test_base.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["OCRResult is frozen dataclass", "register_backend decorator works", "get_backend('missing') raises KeyError", "abstract OCRBackend cannot be instantiated"]}
```

tasks.subject: T5: lib/tomboy_payload.py Firestore document builder
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Build the FirestoreNotePayload shape with date formatting + 900KB guard.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pipeline/desktop/lib/tomboy_payload.py", "pipeline/tests/lib/test_tomboy_payload.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd pipeline && python -m pytest tests/lib/test_tomboy_payload.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["format_tomboy_date emits yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.fffffffzzz with 7 fractional digits", "build_note_content_xml escapes XML special chars", "tags includes system:notebook:<name>", "uri is note://tomboy/<guid>", "oversized payload raises NotePayloadTooLargeError", "first line of xmlContent matches title"]}
```

tasks.subject: T6: lib/firestore_client.py Admin SDK wrapper
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Firebase Admin SDK wrapper exposing get_note/set_note/delete_note against users/{uid}/notes/{guid}.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pipeline/desktop/lib/firestore_client.py", "pipeline/tests/lib/test_firestore_client.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd pipeline && python -m pytest tests/lib/test_firestore_client.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["init is idempotent across instances", "get_note returns None for missing", "set_note adds serverUpdatedAt SERVER_TIMESTAMP", "delete_note writes deleted=True (soft delete)"]}
```

tasks.subject: T7: lib/dropbox_uploader.py upload + share-link
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Dropbox SDK wrapper for image upload + share-link creation (with already-shared fallback).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pipeline/desktop/lib/dropbox_uploader.py", "pipeline/tests/lib/test_dropbox_uploader.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd pipeline && python -m pytest tests/lib/test_dropbox_uploader.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["construct uses oauth2_refresh_token + app_key", "upload writes bytes with WriteMode.overwrite", "share_link returns URL on new link", "share_link falls back to sharing_list_shared_links on already-shared"]}
```

tasks.subject: T8: desktop/bootstrap.py interactive setup
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Interactive Dropbox PKCE OAuth → account_id → uid; prompts for Firebase service account; writes pipeline.yaml.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pipeline/desktop/bootstrap.py", "pipeline/tests/test_bootstrap.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd pipeline && python -m pytest tests/test_bootstrap.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["sanitize_account_id strips dbid: prefix and replaces disallowed chars with -", "compute_uid returns dbx-<sanitized>", "write_config produces YAML round-trippable through load_config", "--dry-run does not write files"]}
```

tasks.subject: T9: pi/inbox_watcher.py
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pi-side script maintaining ~/diary/state/index.json based on inbox contents.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pipeline/pi/inbox_watcher.py", "pipeline/tests/pi/test_inbox_watcher.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd pipeline && python -m pytest tests/pi/test_inbox_watcher.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["scan_inbox finds .metadata files (page UUID = filename stem)", "ignores non-metadata files", "update_index preserves received_at on existing entries", "marks vanished uuids as present:false", "atomic write"]}
```

tasks.subject: T10: Pi systemd units + rM push docs
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Deploy artifacts and operator documentation. [docs only — no TDD]

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pipeline/pi/deploy/pi-watcher.service", "pipeline/pi/deploy/pi-watcher.timer", "pipeline/pi/README.md"], "verifyCommand": "manual review", "acceptanceCriteria": ["timer triggers service every 5min", "service runs python -m pi.inbox_watcher as diary-sync user", "README documents SSH hardening + rM push hook + survival after rM updates"]}
```

tasks.subject: T11: stages/s1_fetch.py Pi rsync pull
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pull every present-in-Pi page into raw/<uuid>/, skipping already-fetched. Transport interface for testability.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pipeline/desktop/stages/s1_fetch.py", "pipeline/tests/stages/test_s1_fetch.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd pipeline && python -m pytest tests/stages/test_s1_fetch.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["fetches only uuids with present:true", "skips already-fetched uuids", "per-uuid try/except continues on failure", "--force re-fetches"]}
```

tasks.subject: T12: stages/s2_prepare.py rM → PNG
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Rasterize each rM page to png/<uuid>/page.png via Renderer interface. Stash metadata for downstream.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pipeline/desktop/stages/s2_prepare.py", "pipeline/tests/stages/test_s2_prepare.py", "pipeline/tests/fixtures/sample-metadata.json"], "verifyCommand": "cd pipeline && python -m pytest tests/stages/test_s2_prepare.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["renders new uuids only", "stores metadata in state for downstream stages", "missing .metadata logs error and skips", "renderer exception continues batch"]}
```

tasks.subject: T13: ocr_backends/local_vlm.py Qwen2.5-VL backend
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Concrete OCRBackend loading Qwen2.5-VL-7B with 4-bit quantization; lazy model load; tests inject _run_inference seam.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pipeline/desktop/ocr_backends/local_vlm.py", "pipeline/tests/ocr_backends/test_local_vlm.py", "pipeline/config/prompts/diary-ko.txt"], "verifyCommand": "cd pipeline && python -m pytest tests/ocr_backends/test_local_vlm.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["construction does not load model", "missing prompt file raises FileNotFoundError", "ocr() strips whitespace from result", "prompt_hash is sha256 of system prompt", "self-registers as 'local_vlm'"]}
```

tasks.subject: T14: stages/s3_ocr.py OCR driver
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Drive the OCR backend on every prepared uuid; emit ocr/<uuid>.json; per-uuid try/except.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pipeline/desktop/stages/s3_ocr.py", "pipeline/tests/stages/test_s3_ocr.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd pipeline && python -m pytest tests/stages/test_s3_ocr.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["processes pending uuids only", "writes ocr/<uuid>.json with text/model/prompt_hash/ts", "skips already-done", "backend exception continues batch"]}
```

tasks.subject: T15: stages/s4_write.py Firestore writer + I1 mapping
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Critical milestone task. Implements I1 mapping: 4 cases (new uuid / still-marked overwrite / marker-removed new note / doc-deleted new note). Image upload precedes Firestore write (fail-closed).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pipeline/desktop/stages/s4_write.py", "pipeline/tests/stages/test_s4_write.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd pipeline && python -m pytest tests/stages/test_s4_write.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["new uuid mints fresh guid", "still-marked overwrites same guid", "marker-removed mints new guid (user-protected)", "doc missing or deleted=true mints new guid", "image upload failure blocks Firestore write", "image path is /Apps/Tomboy/diary-images/yyyy/mm/dd/<uuid>/page.png", "skips already-written"]}
```

tasks.subject: T16: desktop/run_pipeline.py orchestrator
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Thin wrapper running s1 → s2 → s3 → s4 in order; stops on first failure.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pipeline/desktop/run_pipeline.py", "pipeline/tests/test_run_pipeline.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd pipeline && python -m pytest tests/test_run_pipeline.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["runs stages in order", "stops on first failure and returns failed stage name", "CLI: python -m desktop.run_pipeline"]}
```

tasks.subject: T17: tools/extract_corrections.py training triples
tasks.description:
**Goal:** For each uuid where the Tomboy note has had its [<uuid>] marker removed, emit (page.png, ocr.txt, corrected.txt) triple.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pipeline/desktop/tools/extract_corrections.py", "pipeline/tests/test_extract_corrections.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd pipeline && python -m pytest tests/test_extract_corrections.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["parse_corrected_text extracts body between title and ---", "skips when marker still present", "emits triple when marker removed", "idempotent via corrections state file"]}
```

tasks.subject: T18: tools/segment_lines.py line clustering
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Cluster .rm strokes into Y-bands and crop page.png into per-line PNGs. Core (cluster_strokes_by_y, crop_lines) is unit-tested; CLI is a stub.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pipeline/desktop/tools/segment_lines.py", "pipeline/tests/test_segment_lines.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd pipeline && python -m pytest tests/test_segment_lines.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["cluster_strokes_by_y groups close strokes (within threshold)", "handles overlapping strokes by merging", "crop_lines writes line-XX.png files cropped from page"]}
```

tasks.description:

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pipeline/README.md", "CLAUDE.md", "pipeline/desktop/deploy/desktop-pipeline.service", "pipeline/desktop/deploy/desktop-pipeline.timer"], "verifyCommand": "manual review", "acceptanceCriteria": ["README covers bootstrap → run → correction workflow with concrete commands", "CLAUDE.md gains pipeline section linking spec + plan", "systemd units installable via systemctl --user (not enabled by default)"]}
```
